Chipotle is giving 2,000 healthcare workers 🌯 FREE CHIPOTLE FOR A YEAR 🌯 this Nurses Week. How to enter someone to win👇 #chipotlepartner 

Tag one healthcare hero in a comment with a message about their impact below. 

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY. Open to legal residents of the 50 U.S. & DC, 13 years or older (minors must have parental consent). Enter between approx. 12:01 am PT on 4/28/22 – approx. 11:59 pm PT on 5/6/22. Enter by nominating a healthcare professional. For Official Rules including how to enter, definition of healthcare professional, entry limitations, odds, and prize descriptions, visit chipotle.com/healthcareheroes. Sponsor: CMG Strategy Co., LLC

node.text: Twenty five years ago, our founder Steve Ells proved that fresh, sustainably farmed ingredients can be offered with the convenience of fast food. Today, we continue to use quality ingredients and classic cooking techniques so that everyone can eat in a way that’s better for them and better for the environment. Watch Farm to Foil to learn more about our ingredients before they get rolled into burritos, made in partnership with @VICE.
